description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, test and deploy, using the rustdocker/rust Docker images. In the test stage add three jobs—beta, nightly, and stable—each using the rustdocker/rust:beta, rustdocker/rust:nightly, and rustdocker/rust:stable images respectively, and each executing the command `cargo test --verbose --jobs 1 --release`. In the deploy stage add a .pages job that runs only on the master branch, uses the rustdocker/rust:stable image, and runs `cargo doc`, then removes any existing public directory, creates a new public directory, and copies the generated documentation from `target/doc/*` into public. The .pages job publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No services, caches, or additional variables are defined.
